FINAL_ANSWER: The relationship is characterized by three primary mappings: (1) Redundancy/Code Distance (Analogy), (2) Decoherence/Bulk-Boundary Mapping (Conjecture), and (3) Information Locality/Error Locality (Formal Link). Gaps exist in the formal derivation of redundancy-to-distance scaling and the generalization of non-AdS environments.
JUSTIFICATION: The response identifies structural parallels while distinguishing proven links from analogies.
